info.title: Sendly API
info.description: Sendly's public REST API. Authenticate either with a project API key as `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>` (`sk_*` for full access, `pk_*` for sending-only) or with a BetterAuth session cookie. All endpoints return JSON envelopes of the form `{ success, data }` (success) or `{ error: { message, code } }` (failure).

tags.name: Emails
tags.description: Send transactional email and inspect deliveries.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Manage subscribers and per-contact custom data.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Register sending domains and manage SES verification.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Reusable email templates referenced by send operations.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: User-managed outbound webhooks for email and contact events.

tags.name: Suppression
tags.description: Project-scoped suppression list. Hard bounces and complaints land here automatically.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Track custom contact events from your application.

tags.name: Verify
tags.description: Open email-validation endpoint (no auth required). Used by the marketing-site verifier.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key authentication. Use a `sk_*` (FULL) or `pk_*` (SENDING_ONLY) key as the bearer token. Public keys (`pk_*`) are restricted to `POST /api/track` and email-send endpoints.

SessionAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
SessionAuth.description: BetterAuth session cookie. Used by the dashboard / browser clients. When present, the active project is taken from the `x-project-id` header.

Error.description: Standard error envelope returned by all 4xx/5xx responses.

SuccessEmpty.description: Bare success envelope with no payload.

Domain.description: A sending domain registered with SES.

DomainListResponse.description: List of all domains for the auth'd project.

DomainVerificationStatus.description: Outcome of a verification check against SES.

SendEmailResponse.description: Successful send response. `data` is a single object for single sends, an array of `{index,status,data?,error?}` for batch.

BatchEntryResult.description: Per-row result in a batch send response.

BatchSendResponse.description: Multi-status response for `POST /api/emails/batch`. HTTP 207 if any entry failed, else 200.

BatchSendBody.description: Batch send wrapper. Up to 100 entries.

data.description: Arbitrary JSON value (string, number, boolean, null, array, or object).

SendEmail.description: Body for POST /api/emails — send a single transactional email. Either `template` or `subject`+`body` is required.

customFields.description: Arbitrary JSON value (string, number, boolean, null, array, or object).

ContactBulkDeleteBody.description: Bulk delete contacts. Provide either `ids` or `emails` (max 1000 each).

UpdateContactBody.description: Body for PATCH /api/contacts/{id}. `email` is immutable here — use upsert to change addresses.

SuppressionCheckResponse.description: Result of GET /api/suppression/{email} — whether the address is suppressed.

secret.description: Plaintext shared secret. Returned ONCE on create.

WebhookCreateResponse.description: Result of POST /api/webhooks. `secret` is the only time the plaintext is returned — store it securely.

WebhookListResponse.description: List of webhooks for the auth'd project.

WebhookRotateSecretResponse.description: Response from POST /api/webhooks/{id}/rotate-secret — returns the new plaintext once.

WebhookCallsListResponse.description: Cursor-paginated list of recent calls for a single webhook.

VerifyEmailResponse.description: Response from POST /api/verify — outcome of the syntax/MX/disposable check.

region.description: Override SES region for this domain. Defaults to the project region or the env default. Required to match an existing project region.

AddDomainBody.description: Body for POST /api/domains. `projectId` is optional for API-key auth (derived from key) and required for session auth. `region` pins the SES region; on the first domain it locks the project, after that it must match the project's region.

CreateWebhook.description: Body for POST /api/webhooks — register a user webhook for one or more events.

AddSuppression.description: Body for POST /api/suppression — manually add an email to the suppression list.

data.description: Arbitrary JSON value (string, number, boolean, null, array, or object).

TrackEvent.description: Body for POST /api/track — record a custom event for a contact.

VerifyEmail.description: Body for POST /api/verify — validate email syntax, MX, disposable, etc.

post.description: Send a single transactional email. Accepts a `template` ID or an inline `subject` + `body`. An optional `Idempotency-Key` request header (1–255 chars, 24h TTL) ensures replay safety.
